message.content:
@startuml
participant IntegrationTest as IntegrationTest
participant Spring Application as Spring Application
participant De /nSerializer as De /nSerializer
participant ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController as ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController
participant AddMember RequestAssembler as AddMember RequestAssembler
participant AddMemberResponse DTOAssembler as AddMemberResponse DTOAssembler
participant srv:AddMember ToGroupService as srv:AddMember ToGroupService

IntegrationTest ..> Spring Application : POST 1 /groups/"Family"/members/"ana@gmail.com"

Spring Application ..> De /nSerializer : 1.1 deserialze("groupDesc":"Family", "personEmail":"ana@gmail.com")

De /nSerializer ..> ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController : 1.1.1 create (groupDesc, PersonEmail)

ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController ..> AddMember RequestAssembler : 1.2 addMember(info)

AddMember RequestAssembler ..> ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController : 1.2.1 addMemberMapToDTO (info.getGroupDescription(), info.getPersonEmail())

ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController ..> AddMember RequestAssembler : 1.2.2 addMemeber(requestDTO)

AddMember RequestAssembler ..> srv:AddMember ToGroupService : 1.2.3 groupDTO

srv:AddMember ToGroupService ..> ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController : 1.2.4 mapToGroupResponseDTO(GroupDTO)

ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController ..> AddMemberResponse DTOAssembler : 1.2.4.1 create

AddMemberResponse DTOAssembler ..> srv:AddMember ToGroupService : 1.2.5 groupRespDTO

srv:AddMember ToGroupService ..> IntegrationTest : 1.4 HttpResponse

IntegrationTest ..> Spring Application : 1.5 HttpResponse

ctrl:AddMember ToGroupController ..> De /nSerializer : 1.2.6 ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO, HttpStatus.OK)

De /nSerializer ..> Spring Application : 1.3 serialize(ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO, HttpStatus.OK))

Spring Application ..> IntegrationTest : 1.4 HttpResponse

@enduml
